---
title: "ENAR Spring Meeting 2026"
subtitle: "Similarity Weighted Covariate Adjusterd Response Adaptive (SW-CARA) Clinical Trials"
author: "Various"
date: 2026-03-15
format: html
categories: ["Poster", "ENAR", "Randomization"]
---

The following poster was presented at the ENAR 2026 Spring Meeting.

![](dubose_swcara_poster_2026_print_ready.jpg)
